name: Car Jam Escape
description: Car Jam Escape is a puzzle game where players clear a crowded parking lot by moving cars in the correct order. Each vehicle can only move forward in the direction it faces, so players must study the layout and plan carefully. The goal is to guide every car out without collisions or blockages. As levels progress, the puzzles become more complex, requiring logical thinking and strategy. With simple rules and challenging traffic jams, the game offers a fun and brain-teasing experience for puzzle lovers.
instructions: Use the mouse to play the game Simply click or tap on a car to move it forward in the direction it is facing Make sure the path in front of the vehicle is clear before selecting it Continue tapping the correct cars in order to clear the parking lot and
